query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `availability` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `dayOfWeek` int NOT NULL, `startTime` varchar(8) NOT NULL, `endTime` varchar(8) NOT NULL, `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true, `timezone` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'America/Los_Angeles', CONSTRAINT `availability_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`));
